eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Simpson, KY; at 8:59 AM on JAN 7, 2019 Effective until 9:59 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Simpson County IPAWS system and monthly preparedness message Preparedness Information can be found at www.facebook.com/SimpsonCountyOEM/
